basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Ropar (IIT Ropar) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Ropar has released the official notification for 1 Junior Research Fellow posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.A / M.Sc in Linguistics/ Psychology/ Cognitive Science or related area with minimum 55% marks, UGC-NET/ GATE Qualified
qualification.details: M.A / M.Sc in Linguistics/ Psychology/ Cognitive Science or related area with minimum 55% marks. UGC-NET/ GATE Qualified.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Ropar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Ropar Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Ropar Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Ropar Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Ropar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Ropar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Ropar Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Ropar is July 7, 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.A. or M.Sc. degree in Linguistics, Psychology, Cognitive Science, or a related field with a minimum of 55% marks. Additionally, UGC-NET or GATE qualification is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Junior Research Fellow position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000, along with a 10% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Junior Research Fellow role at IIT Ropar?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application along with all necessary documents to the official email address provided in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow position in this recruitment drive by IIT Ropar.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position is a contract-based job.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Ropar located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Ropar is located in Rupnagar, Punjab, with the pincode 140001.

faq.question: Q10. Does IIT Ropar provide age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify details regarding age relaxation for reserved categories. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for precise information.
